name: bloggerseo
description: BloggerSEO Worker v7: 100% 자체 제작 서버리스 Redis(Durable Objects) + Argo Smart Routing + Regional Tiered Cache + Priority Routing + Cache Reserve (4h) + 자동 스키마 마크업(Article/FAQ 필수) + 관리 패널

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm-src && npx asc assembly/index.ts -o bloggerseo.wasm --target release -O3 --runtime stub --exportRuntime && node build-blob.js
